cases.name: two-step chain success
cases.description: Inputs: 2x item0, with recipes item0->item1 and item1->item2. Output target: 2x item2. Why: each step is one-for-one, so each recipe runs twice and inventory ends at item0=0, item1=0, item2=2.

cases.name: infeasible target produces error
cases.description: Inputs: 1x item0 and only recipe item0->item1. Output target: 1x item2. Why: no recipe path produces item2, so the model is infeasible and must return error status.
